Entry.JapaneseText: Commoner RTM
Entry.EnglishText: Commoner RTM

Entry.JapaneseText: ひー！ 死ぬかと思ったー！
Entry.EnglishText: Eeeek! I thought I was a goneeer!

Entry.JapaneseText: こんな事なら部屋から出なけりゃ良かったぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: If I knew this was gonna happen, I'd have stayed indoors!

Entry.JapaneseText: この野郎！ もう容赦しねぇぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: You bastard! I won't show you any more mercy!

Entry.JapaneseText: こうなりゃ意地だ！ 負けねぇぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: This is about willpower now! I ain't losin'!

Entry.JapaneseText: ぶっちゃけると、俺らにはケンカしか娯楽がねぇーんだ！
Entry.EnglishText: To tell the truth, fighting is the only entertainment we have!

Entry.JapaneseText: やったるぜー！ 俺らの力、見くびるな！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's do this! Don't you belittle our strength!

Entry.JapaneseText: かかってこいやー！ ビビったりしねーぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: Bring it on! Don't chicken out on me now!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らが黙ってやられると思うんじゃねぇーぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: Don't think we're gonna just shut up and take this!

Entry.JapaneseText: タダじゃやられねぇぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: I ain't lettin' you beat me so easy!

Entry.JapaneseText: 行け行けー！ 俺らが負けるわけねぇー！
Entry.EnglishText: Come on, come on! No way we're gonna lose!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺より強い奴はどこにいるんだー！
Entry.EnglishText: Is there actually anyone stronger than me here?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 何するだぁー！
Entry.EnglishText: What're you doing?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らの事、見くびるとケガするぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Snub us and you're gonna get hurt!

Entry.JapaneseText: 本気で叩く事ないだろ！
Entry.EnglishText: You don't have to fight so seriously!

Entry.JapaneseText: とんでもねぇ…
Entry.EnglishText: Unbelieveable...

Entry.JapaneseText: アイツを怒らせたのはマズかったか！？
Entry.EnglishText: Was pissing them off a bad idea?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 敵はハンパじゃねぇ！ 皆も気合入れろ！
Entry.EnglishText: This enemy's no fool! Time for everyone to give it their all!

Entry.JapaneseText: この野郎！ もう容赦しねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: You bastard! No more mercy!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らには俺らの事情があるんだよ！
Entry.EnglishText: We've got our own circumstances!

Entry.JapaneseText: ヨソモンにデカイ面はさせねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: We won't let you outsiders act so high and mighty!

Entry.JapaneseText: こんなでけぇタンコブ見たことねぇ…
Entry.EnglishText: I've never seen a bump like this before...

Entry.JapaneseText: 強ぇ！ 見た目と全然違うじゃねぇーか！
Entry.EnglishText: He's strong! Totally different from how he looks!

Entry.JapaneseText: 冗談みてぇに強い野郎だ！
Entry.EnglishText: This dude's strength is no joke!

Entry.JapaneseText: ケンカ売る相手を選ぶべきだったな！
Entry.EnglishText: I should've picked a better opponent!

Entry.JapaneseText: うげぇ！ 今のはきいたぁ〜
Entry.EnglishText: Augh! You hear that just now~?

Entry.JapaneseText: ちょい待ち！ 腰が抜けたぁ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hold up! I threw my back out!

Entry.JapaneseText: ダメだ、勝てっこねぇ…
Entry.EnglishText: It's no good. I can't win...

Entry.JapaneseText: 負けっぱなしじゃ終われねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: I can't keep losing!

Entry.JapaneseText: 勝てる気がしねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: Doesn't feel like we can win this!

Entry.JapaneseText: 強ぇ！ 惚れちまいそうだ！
Entry.EnglishText: So strong! I'm impressed!

Entry.JapaneseText: ヤベェ！ こいつらシャレになんねー！
Entry.EnglishText: Not good! These folks are no joke!

Entry.JapaneseText: 何食ったらあんなに強くなるんだ？
Entry.EnglishText: The heck do they eat to get this strong?

Entry.JapaneseText: ヤバい相手にケンカを売っちまった…
Entry.EnglishText: I picked a fight with a really dangerous opponent...
